svg.title: WebMS-Intra emblem
svg.desc: WebMS network held inside a rounded portal frame that opens at the base — the internal-tools portal sub-brand of WebMS. HOW TO RECOLOUR: every colour is a named token in (brand, ink, grey, intra, on-brand) referenced by url(#token). Edit a token's stop-color(s) once to recolour everywhere it is used.

linearGradient.desc: BRAND token — primary indigo gradient. Edit these two stop-colors to recolour the brand everywhere it is referenced via fill/stroke="url(#brand)".

g.title: Portal frame
g.desc: Rounded frame open at the base — an internal space with a way in (the "Portal").

g.title: Network
g.desc: The WebMS connection mark, scaled to sit inside the portal frame.
